textByHashes.5814d9070f1032ef5275dfe18bd677dbd448244c: Hello! You must be the human that's been helping out around here.
textByHashes.e0757109bd0553741b872d05bac8da1c85cbfd0b: Well, I'm Nama, one of the elders who specialises in dealing with the gryphons.
textByHashes.667336c851c3e8542e292da56d16c4d4240f7287: One of the more problematic gryphons has made a home in this cave. I'm here to keep an eye on it.
textByHashes.7d977025707fd16340b25cb77141f6f2bb6e5ad9: Help is always appreciated, but I wouldn't go charging in there without good reason. We don't want to anger the gryphon unnecessary.
textByHashes.62f2982e46fe4af5bad300cefd382d494cffc3ee: Thankfully it hasn't been overly aggressive so far. It's important we keep it in check, but we don't want to go overboard and anger it unnecessary.
textByHashes.074f0b1665714659a491722483cff59b9a625944: A clue scroll, you say? Let me see...
textByHashes.ad85aec03e5197479b614d321b5d1c69286ccb00: Hmm... yes, that would appear to be this gryphon. Very well, I will allow you to fight it once, but no more than that.
textByHashes.a60526785ebaafc54bf301cd88eb38aba72294d9: Sorry, but I can't let you go in there without permission.
textByHashes.8cf44cd90d244039155b596c25fe55f85e952e00: Wait! That gryphon does not currently pose a threat to us. You shouldn't attack it without permission!
